notes.en: Growth factor-reduced Matrigel. HUVECs passage 2-6. Positive: VEGF 50 ng/mL. Score tube length, branch points, meshes.
notes.zh: 用低生长因子 Matrigel。HUVECs 第 2-6 代。阳性对照：VEGF 50 ng/mL。评估管长、分支点、网格。

briefSteps.en: Thaw growth factor-reduced Matrigel on ice overnight → coat pre-chilled 96-well plate with 50 µL/well → polymerize 30 min at 37°C → seed 1–2×10⁴ HUVECs (passage 2–6) per well ± treatments → incubate 4–8 h at 37°C → image by phase-contrast → quantify tube length, branch points, and meshes with ImageJ Angiogenesis Analyzer
briefSteps.zh: 冰上过夜融化低生长因子 Matrigel → 每孔 50 µL 包被预冷 96 孔板 → 37°C 聚合 30 min → 每孔铺 1–2×10⁴ HUVECs（2–6 代）± 处理 → 37°C 孵育 4–8 h → 相差显微镜拍照 → ImageJ Angiogenesis Analyzer 定量管长、分支点和网格

detailedSteps.en: Thaw growth factor-reduced Matrigel on ice at 4°C overnight (never at room temperature — it polymerizes irreversibly above 10°C); keep all tips, plates, and tubes on ice throughout the procedure.
detailedSteps.zh: 将低生长因子 Matrigel 在冰上 4°C 过夜融化（切勿在室温融化——10°C 以上会不可逆聚合）；操作全程保持枪头、孔板和离心管置于冰上。

detailedSteps.en: Pre-chill a 96-well plate on ice for 15 min; add 50 µL growth factor-reduced Matrigel per well using pre-chilled tips; avoid bubbles; work quickly to prevent premature gelation.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 96 孔板在冰上预冷 15 min；用预冷枪头每孔加 50 µL 低生长因子 Matrigel；避免气泡；动作要快防止提前凝胶化。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer plate to 37°C incubator and allow Matrigel to polymerize for 30 min; do not disturb plate during polymerization.
detailedSteps.zh: 将孔板转入 37°C 培养箱，孵育 30 min 使 Matrigel 聚合；聚合过程中不要晃动孔板。

detailedSteps.en: Harvest HUVECs at passage 2–6 (higher passages show reduced tube-forming capacity); resuspend in serum-free or EBM-2 basal medium at 1–2×10⁵ cells/mL.
detailedSteps.zh: 收集 2–6 代 HUVECs（传代越高管形成能力越弱）；用无血清或 EBM-2 基础培养基重悬至 1–2×10⁵ 细胞/mL。

detailedSteps.en: Seed 100–150 µL (1–2×10⁴ cells) per well on polymerized Matrigel; immediately add treatments (e.g., VEGF 50 ng/mL as positive control, anti-angiogenic agents at desired concentrations); include untreated and vehicle controls.
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔铺 100–150 µL（1–2×10⁴ 细胞）于聚合好的 Matrigel 上；立即加入处理（如阳性对照 VEGF 50 ng/mL，或所需浓度的抗血管生成药物）；设未处理和溶剂对照。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂; tube formation typically begins within 2–4 h and reaches maximum complexity at 4–8 h; collapse occurs after 12–24 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 孵育；管形成通常在 2–4 h 内开始，4–8 h 达到最复杂状态；12–24 h 后开始崩塌。

detailedSteps.en: Image at the optimal timepoint (4–8 h) using phase-contrast microscopy (4× or 5× objective); capture 3–5 images per well at random positions.
detailedSteps.zh: 在最佳时间点（4–8 h）用相差显微镜（4× 或 5× 物镜）拍照；每孔随机拍 3–5 张图。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify tube formation parameters using ImageJ Angiogenesis Analyzer plugin: measure total tube length, number of branch points (junctions), number of closed meshes, and number of master segments; report all parameters normalized to control.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 ImageJ Angiogenesis Analyzer 插件定量管形成参数：测量总管长、分支点（节点）数、封闭网格数和主干节段数；所有参数归一化至对照组后报告。

note.en: Matrigel-coated plate can be kept at 37°C for up to 1 h before seeding cells if needed
note.zh: 如需要，铺好 Matrigel 的孔板可在 37°C 最多放置 1 h 再铺细胞

usage.en: Assess angiogenic potential by endothelial cell tube formation on Matrigel.
usage.zh: Matrigel 上内皮细胞管腔形成实验评估血管生成能力。
